title: inga vulpina
intro: Inga vulpina, also known as the velvet tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae native to South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Inga vulpina include reducing inflammation and fever, as well as treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Inga vulpina can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health issues.
